blocks.text: Match preview: Zimbabwe face Bangladesh in One-off Test (TEST) on Sun, 28 Jun, 2026, 1:00 pm at Harare Sports Club Harare. Full pitch report, weather forecast, and squad details below.
Standard TEST surface expected. Conditions will be clearer at the toss — monitor team selection and dew factor for night games.
Expected par score: 300–400 runs per innings typical.
Clear sky · High 19°C / Low 9°C · Rain: 0 mm · Wind: up to 12 km/h. Dry conditions expected — good for batting if the pitch is true.
International playing XI is announced at the toss. Check back on match day for confirmed line-ups.
